titleStmt.title: SII 24.134: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 134. (A.R. No. 120 of 1938-39.) III PRĀKĀRA, EAST WALL.

summary.p: Registers a gift of land by Kōdaikaṇi Śeṭṭiyār of Kuḷamukkil for rearing a flower garden called Perundēvi for the god. Veṅgūr Śrīrāmabhaṭṭa-Vājapē [ya*]-yājiyār was the Śrīkāryam of the temple. (See No. 138 below). The date is lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . periyakoyil śrīkāriyam veṅkūr cirāmapaṭṭavājapeya yājiyār Evaṟpaṭi . tiruppati śrī vayiṣṇavaril vaṅkippuṟattu viṟṟirun ḻukil p perumāḷukku Ivan perāl tirunantavaṉañ ceykaikku kuṭutta sammāta pattirappaṭi . tripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkolottuṅka coḻatevaṟkku
vatu periyakoyil śrīvayiṣṇavaril vaṅkippuṟattu viṟṟiruntā nampiyen kuḷamukkil kotaikaṇiceṭṭiyārkku nāṉ ceyyak kaṭavenāna tirunantavanattukkellaiyāvatu ten ṇṭān tirunantavaṉattukku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai tennāṟṟukku vaṭakkum mipāṟkellai tiruvālitācar tirunantavanattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapā
ṟkellai meṟku nokkiṉa peruvaḻikku teṟkum Āka Ivvicainta perunānkellaiyuḷ Akappaṭṭa tirunantavaṉattil vaṭameṟkuc cārtti tirukkopura(k kopura)kkollai kuḻi 5 10 Ikkuḻi Aimpatu ḷ vaiyttu piṟittu karuvāḻaiyun teṅkum vaiyttu Aḻakiya maṇavāḷap perumāḷ tirunāḷkaḷilu Amutu ceytiru ntiruk
kāṭcikaḷu cāttiyaruḷa tiruppaḷḷittāmaṅkaḷum Eṭuttu viṇṇappañ ceyyumiṭatSome space is left blank here. peruntevi Ennun tirunāmattāle viṇṇappañ ceyyak kaṭavatākavum Ittirunan=ta vanañ ceyyu vaṅkicattārumey ceyyakkaṭavarāka kuṭutta nokki ? pon 10 3 Ippon patin munṟum koṇṭu Ittirunantavanam cantirātittavaṟ
ceyyakkaṭavenāka sammatittu sammātapattiram kuṭutten Ikkuḷamu kaṇiceṭṭikku Ivviṟṟiruntān nampiyen Ippaṭikkivai karuṇākarap piriyaneḻuttu .Engraved in continuation of the previous inscription.
Digital edition of SII 24.134 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
